Skill Path: Foraging

You are a master at procuring rations in dire situations.

While developing your skills in Survival you chose to focus specifically on Foraging, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gnH9SpdNQegDqIar]{All of the Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.8qebBeOJsyRIchcu]{Forager}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{Subsist}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gnH9SpdNQegDqIar]{All of the Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.8qebBeOJsyRIchcu]{Forager}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.fOIUmDGa9gkeCHA0]{Supertaster}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Yj4mpROEjdCjQzMd]{Planar Survival}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Vk7BzAb3D9r226sI]{Legendary Guide}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Ta61ObC8Lk7BxTFO]{Legendary Survivalist}
